## ParentControl interface

An interface to interact with the parent of this control.

**Signature:**

```typescript
interface ParentControl<Positioning, ParsedPosition = Parsed<Positioning>> 
```

[recalculate()](./openrct2-flexui.parentcontrol.recalculate.md)
